description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring broad, elongated green leaves with visible vein patterns, radiating from several upright, pale green stems. The plant is set in a round, white pot with a subtle horizontal black band encircling its midsection. The pot contains a visible layer of brown soil, with the plant's stems emerging from the center. The leaves are arranged in a somewhat irregular, natural pattern, with some arching outward and others standing more upright. The pot appears to be made of a matte, possibly ceramic or plastic material, and the plant itself is likely an artificial or stylized representation of a real species. There are no visible decorative elements or labels attached to the pot or plant.
description: A medium potted plant with broad, veined green leaves and upright stems in a plain white pot with a black band, set in brown soil.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plant's broad leaves fanning outward and the pot's black band clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the arching leaves and the soil surface, with the pot's band partially obscured.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the upright stems and the pot's round shape, with leaves overlapping each other.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing more of the plant's stems and the irregular arrangement of the leaves.
attribute_plant_species: Dieffenbachia (dumb cane) or similar broad-leaf houseplant
